The implementation already has the full Game of Life logic. This test should verify the blinker oscillator pattern.

Blinker Gen 0: [[0,0], [0,1], [0,2]] (vertical line)
Blinker Gen 1: [[-1,1], [0,1], [1,1]] (horizontal line)

Use a helper to sort both arrays for comparison since order doesn't matter. Something like:
```typescript
const sort = (cells: [number, number][]) => [...cells].sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0] || a[1] - b[1]);
const result = nextGeneration([[0, 0], [0, 1], [0, 2]]);
expect(sort(result)).toEqual(sort([[-1, 1], [0, 1], [1, 1]]));
```

Since the implementation already handles this correctly, the test will likely pass immediately. That's fine.

NOTE: Test 8 is being activated in parallel by another agent.
